executives.name: Gary Nagle
executives.background: Gary Nagle joined Glencore in 2000 and was appointed Chief Executive Officer in July 2021. He has held various senior roles across the group, including CEO of Glencore's coal assets in Australia and head of the ferroalloys marketing business in Switzerland. He holds commerce and accounting degrees from the University of the Witwatersrand and is a Chartered Accountant in South Africa.

executives.name: Steven Kalmin
executives.background: Steven Kalmin joined Glencore in 1999 and has been the Chief Financial Officer since 2005. He oversaw the company's IPO in 2011 and the merger with Xstrata in 2013. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce from the University of New South Wales and is a member of the Institute of Chartered Accountants in Australia.

executives.name: Shaun Teichner
executives.background: Shaun Teichner joined Glencore in 2011 and was appointed General Counsel in 2019. He previously worked as a partner at a leading South African law firm. He holds BA and LLB degrees from the University of the Witwatersrand.

board_of_directors.name: Kalidas Madhavpeddi
board_of_directors.background: Kalidas Madhavpeddi was appointed Chairman in July 2021. He has over 40 years of experience in the international mining industry, including as CEO of China Molybdenum International. He holds degrees from the Indian Institute of Technology and the University of Iowa.

board_of_directors.name: Gary Nagle
board_of_directors.background: Chief Executive Officer of Glencore plc.

board_of_directors.name: Martin Gilbert
board_of_directors.background: Martin Gilbert was the co-founder and CEO of Aberdeen Asset Management. He is currently Chairman of Revolut and AssetCo plc.

board_of_directors.name: Cynthia Carroll
board_of_directors.background: Cynthia Carroll was previously the CEO of Anglo American plc and has held senior executive roles at Alcan. She is a geologist by training.
committees: Health, Safety, Environment and Communities Committee (Chair)

board_of_directors.name: Gill Marcus
board_of_directors.background: Gill Marcus was the Governor of the South African Reserve Bank and a former member of the South African Parliament.

board_of_directors.name: David Miller
board_of_directors.background: David Miller is a former partner at Elliott Advisors (UK) and has extensive experience in investment and restructuring.

board_of_directors.name: Liz Hewitt
board_of_directors.background: Liz Hewitt has held senior roles at Smith & Nephew and 3i Group. She is a Chartered Accountant.

sources.source_description: Official Glencore Board of Directors page
